name: ayla-local-agent-vscode
description: Standalone internal-model chat participant for VS Code backed by Ollama.

chatParticipants.name: ayla-agent
chatParticipants.description: Local workspace assistant backed by an internal Ollama model picker.

commands.name: use-model
commands.description: Switch the active model for this session.

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Ask the model for a bounded plan.

commands.name: agent
commands.description: Run the bounded internal agent loop.

commands.name: patch
commands.description: Propose a patch without applying it.

commands.name: apply
commands.description: Apply the pending patch after approval.

commands.title: Ayla Local Agent: Open Direct Chat Diagnostics

aylaLocalAgent.ollamaBaseUrl.markdownDescription: Base URL for the local Ollama server.

aylaLocalAgent.activeModel.markdownDescription: Active Ollama model used when the session has no explicit override.

aylaLocalAgent.defaultModel.markdownDescription: Legacy fallback model when aylaLocalAgent.activeModel is unset.

aylaLocalAgent.defaultNonSlashMode.markdownDescription: How normal non-slash prompts should be handled by the local agent.

aylaLocalAgent.readMaxBytes.markdownDescription: Maximum bytes returned from a file read.

aylaLocalAgent.searchMaxResults.markdownDescription: Maximum text-search matches returned per request.

aylaLocalAgent.showAgentTrace.markdownDescription: Show visible agent trace sections directly in chat during agent runs.

aylaLocalAgent.showCommandOutput.markdownDescription: Show bounded command output and observation details in the chat trace.

aylaLocalAgent.showModelActionJson.markdownDescription: Show bounded parsed model action JSON in the chat trace.

aylaLocalAgent.maxTraceOutputBytes.markdownDescription: Maximum bytes of command or observation text shown in the chat trace.

aylaLocalAgent.commandAllowlist.markdownDescription: Explicit command prefixes allowed through run-command and validate.

aylaLocalAgent.blockedPaths.markdownDescription: Workspace-relative paths blocked from direct reads or edits.

ayla.ollama.baseUrl.markdownDescription: Base URL for the local Ollama server used by Ayla local model provider.

ayla.ollama.defaultModel.markdownDescription: Default Ollama model id used for Ayla local sessions.

ayla.modelProvider.mode.markdownDescription: Model provider mode for Ayla agent runtime.

ayla.gateway.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable the Ayla Local Brain Gateway as the primary local model/runtime provider.

ayla.gateway.baseUrl.markdownDescription: Base URL for the Ayla Local Brain Gateway.

ayla.gateway.mode.markdownDescription: Gateway failure mode: require the gateway, or explicitly allow direct local fallback.

ayla.gateway.research.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable gateway research endpoints when the gateway supports them.

ayla.gateway.preferGateway.markdownDescription: Prefer the gateway over direct Ollama for the main Ayla Agent path.

ayla.gateway.containerSidecar.enabled.markdownDescription: Use the internal container sidecar adapter instead of the gateway server when gateway routing is enabled.

ayla.gateway.containerSidecar.chatBaseUr.markdownDescription: Base URL for the local ayla-ollama chat sidecar.

ayla.gateway.containerSidecar.openAiBase.markdownDescription: Base URL for the local OpenAI-compatible sidecar wrapper.

ayla.gateway.containerSidecar.timeoutMs.markdownDescription: Timeout for container sidecar health, chat, and trace requests.

scripts.compile: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('out',{ recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p ./
scripts.gateway:dev: npm run gateway:build && npm run gateway:start
